description_long: This object is a vintage-style shotgun with a dark wooden stock and a flared, blunderbuss-style barrel. The body features a rich, polished wood grain, while the barrel and action are constructed from dark metal, giving it a robust and historical appearance. The trigger guard is ornate and elongated, curving downward in a decorative fashion, and the trigger mechanism is clearly visible. The stock is full and solid, designed for shoulder firing, and the overall build suggests a heavy, durable firearm. The barrel is single and wide-mouthed, with no visible ribbing or venting. The finish is mostly matte with some glossy highlights on the metal parts, and the object appears well-crafted and detailed.
description: A vintage, single-barrel shotgun with a dark wooden stock, flared metal barrel, and ornate trigger guard. The design is robust and historical, with a polished wood and metal finish.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed from the rear, showing the rounded end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the flared barrel, ornate trigger guard, and the detailed wooden stock.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the wide, flared muzzle of the barrel and the linear arrangement of the barrel and stock.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile displays the same flared barrel and ornate trigger guard, with the wooden stock's curvature visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, flared muzzle, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, ornate, curved downward with decorative features
